Ice Cream Cone — 1 Scoop
Single scoop of house-made ice cream in a waffle cone
FJD$6
Price
1×
Portions
1 min
Prep
0 min
Cook
All Day
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Ice Cream
Ice cream, 1 scoop (flavour of the day)scoop1
Cone
Waffle coneeach1
Method
1
Select waffle cone. Check for cracks.
2
Scoop 1 level scoop of ice cream using correct size scoop.
3
Press gently into cone. Ensure stable base.
4
Serve immediately.
Plating Notes
Cone upright. Scoop centred. Serve in holder or hand direct to guest.
Equipment
Ice cream scoop · Cone holder
